name: options-analysis-suite
description: Access your options analysis data, market research, and portfolio risk metrics directly in Claude.

email.title: Account Email
email.description: Your Options Analysis Suite account email

password.title: Account Password
password.description: Your account password (stored in OS keychain)

search_api_key.title: Brave Search API Key
search_api_key.description: Optional Brave Search API key for web search. Get a free key at api.search.brave.com

tools.name: get_iv_history
tools.description: Get historical implied/historical volatility for a symbol

tools.name: get_greeks_history
tools.description: Get historical options Greeks with recent/trend summaries, plus DTE and moneyness filters for narrower slices

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Get MARKET COMPOSITE stress regime with raw composite score bands, key drivers, and compact feature z-scores by default (not per-symbol — use get_regime_symbol for that)

tools.name: get_earnings
tools.description: Get earnings history and estimates

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get recent stock-specific news, relevance-ranked by company profile, with full=true for the raw feed

tools.name: get_short_volume
tools.description: Get FINRA short volume data with a compact default summary and full=true for the raw history

tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: Get compact company fundamentals with metadata, key ratios, and summarized statements

tools.name: get_dividends
tools.description: Get per-symbol dividend history with ex-dates, cash amounts, and payment metadata

tools.name: get_yield_curve
tools.description: Get the US Treasury yield curve with key rates, inversion flags, and compact trend samples by default; use full=true for the raw history payload

tools.name: get_insider_trading
tools.description: Get insider trading with grouped open-market buy/sell events and summarized administrative activity

tools.name: get_most_active_options
tools.description: Get the most active options flow; default contract view returns representative liquid leaders, with view=ticker for aggregated underlying activity

tools.name: get_risk_free_rate
tools.description: Get the current 10Y Treasury-based benchmark served by the platform risk-free-rate endpoint, with a note to use get_yield_curve for shorter maturities

tools.name: get_options_analytics_history
tools.description: Get historical daily analytics snapshots (IV, skew, expected move, rates/dividend yield, GEX/DEX/VEX, net vanna/charm/vomma) — for walls and current Greek exposures use get_regime_symbol

tools.name: get_iv_surface
tools.description: Get IV surface/skew across strikes and expirations

tools.name: get_stock_prices
tools.description: Get historical OHLCV price data with a compact trend summary and the requested daily bars

tools.name: get_stock_splits
tools.description: Get per-symbol stock split history with ratios and labels

tools.name: get_short_interest
tools.description: Get FINRA biweekly short interest with a compact default summary and full=true for the raw settlement history

tools.name: get_analyst_data
tools.description: Get analyst ratings, price targets, nearest forward estimate periods, and compact rating-history summaries

tools.name: get_economic_calendar
tools.description: Get upcoming macro economic events with a catalyst-focused default summary

tools.name: get_ipo_calendar
tools.description: Get the IPO calendar for upcoming and recent public listings

tools.name: get_dividend_calendar
tools.description: Get the dividend calendar for upcoming and recent cash dividend events

tools.name: get_split_calendar
tools.description: Get the stock split calendar for upcoming and recent split events

tools.name: get_options_chain
tools.description: Get the latest available end-of-day options chain summary by default, with expirations, ATM term structure, skew, and representative near-money contracts across the curve; a specific date can also be requested

tools.name: get_sec_filings
tools.description: Get recent SEC EDGAR filings with form/category summaries by default and full=true for the raw filing list

tools.name: get_fail_to_deliver
tools.description: Get SEC Failure-to-Deliver data with a compact recent/spike summary by default and full=true for raw history; default window is 180 days because SEC publication lags about 21 days

tools.name: get_threshold_history
tools.description: Get SEC Reg SHO threshold-list history with a compact current/recent status summary by default and full=true for the raw date list

tools.name: get_dark_pool_data
tools.description: Get FINRA OTC/dark pool and ATS weekly trading summaries and trends

tools.name: get_trading_halts
tools.description: Get active and recent trading halts with duplicate feed rows condensed and latest active halt states prioritized by default

tools.name: get_activist_filings
tools.description: Get Schedule 13D/13G beneficial-ownership filings with current above-threshold holder snapshots by default and below-threshold amendments summarized separately; full=true returns the raw filing list

tools.name: get_intraday_regime
tools.description: Get intraday market regime scans with Greek exposure snapshots

tools.name: get_regime_symbol
tools.description: Get per-symbol regime classification and authoritative Greek exposures

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for real-time financial information and news

tools.name: get_platform_info
tools.description: Get platform background information

tools.name: get_analysis_history
tools.description: Get user's options pricing analysis history, with near-identical reruns collapsed in the default view and full=true for raw history

tools.name: get_gex_snapshot
tools.description: Get user's Gamma Exposure snapshots

tools.name: get_portfolio_snapshot
tools.description: Get user's portfolio snapshots with Greeks, with consecutive identical snapshots collapsed in the default view

tools.name: get_risk_snapshot
tools.description: Get user's risk analysis snapshots, with consecutive identical snapshots collapsed in the default view

tools.name: get_analysis_rollups
tools.description: Get user's analysis trend aggregates with compact rollup rows, cross-period summaries, and full=true for raw synced rows

tools.name: get_fft_results
tools.description: Get user's FFT scanner results — mispricing signals and calibration data

tools.name: get_user_annotations
tools.description: Get user's research notes, tags, and alerts, with a truthful empty state when none have been synced yet

tools.name: query_analysis
tools.description: Query analysis history with numeric filters (delta, volatility, DTE ranges), with near-identical reruns collapsed in the default view

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Get structured current-user account info, subscription status, and MCP capabilities such as web search

tools.name: get_compute_runs
tools.description: Get user's AI Compute Suite run history with compact run summaries, exposure key levels, and representative position/model outputs; use full=true for raw synced runs

tools.name: get_unusual_options
tools.description: Get unusual options flow ranked by volume-to-open-interest ratio; default contract view returns representative unusual flow, with view=ticker for aggregated underlyings

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Get a compact normalized company profile with float metrics, identifiers, and a trimmed description; use full=true for the raw synced row
